prose: Solid day, Alfie — about 6,500 steps, nearly five hours on your feet, and you ate about 2,210 against 2,475 burned, so you closed with a 265-calorie deficit. The one gap was protein: 126g is well short of where you want to be for someone training as hard as you. Make protein the priority tomorrow — front-load it at breakfast so you're not playing catch-up by dinner.
